name: Shigure Yukimi
description:
__Race:__ Human
__Height:__ 150 cm (4'11") (Catastrophe) 151 cm (4'11½")[1] (Vampire Reign)
__Affiliation:__ Order of the Imperial Moon, Japanese Imperial Demon Army, Guren Ichinose's Aides
__Section:__ Moon Demon Company, Guren Squad
__Rank:__ Second Lieutenant

She is a second lieutenant of the Japanese Imperial Demon Army and a member of Guren's squad in the Moon Demon Company. Like Sayuri Hanayori, Shigure is also a servant for the Ichinose Family. 

~!Similar to Sayuri, she's very protective of Guren, and does not hesitate to carry out his orders. Like Sayuri, she also has a crush on Guren, but does not show it often.!~
